heading: Paying for main pipes
label: 9505 Paying for main pipes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)950540:55.R.S. § 1805.In subsection (b), the words “its inhabitants” are substituted for “inhabitants of Washington and Georgetown” in section 1805 of the Revised Statutes because of the Act of (ch. 79, ).February 11, 189528 Stat. 650
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)950540:55.R.S. § 1805.In subsection (b), the words “its inhabitants” are substituted for “inhabitants of Washington and Georgetown” in section 1805 of the Revised Statutes because of the Act of (ch. 79, ).February 11, 189528 Stat. 650

children.heading: .—Federal Government
children.label: a .—Federal Government
children.text: The Federal Government shall only pay for the number of main pipes of the Washington Aqueduct needed to furnish public buildings, offices, and grounds with the necessary supply of water.

children.heading: .—District of Columbia
children.label: b .—District of Columbia
children.text: The District of Columbia shall pay the cost of any main pipe of the Washington Aqueduct which supplies water to the inhabitants of the District of Columbia, in the manner provided by law.
